features: TEA TREE, HYALURONIC & GREEN TEA CLEANSING WIPES We’ve got the perfect solution for irritated and red eyes! Our eye wipes are packed with great food for your skin and come individually wrapped so that you can refresh your face, cleanse your eye on the go!

POWERFUL INGREDIENTS Containing green tea, chamomile, tea tree oil, and aloe vera to soothe and calm irritations and hyaluronic acid to moisturize, our wipes will leave your eyes refreshed and feeling better. Relieves dry and itchy eyes, Blepharitis, and Demodex.

QUICK AND EASY Perfect for ocular hygiene, you will get that proper cleansing easily! Our wipes are excellent for cleaning debris, dirt, and oils that are left on your eyes and lids and you won’t get any burning sensation because it’s gentle on the skin and non-irritating. No need to wash off!

NATURAL & SAFE Made with natural ingredients, these wipes are safe for everyday use as part of your beauty routine and can be even used to remove makeup! They can be used for your eyes or your facial skin.

100% SATISFACTION FOR EVERY ONE OF OUR CUSTOMERS: We truly believe in our products; therefore, we offer 100% customer satisfaction. Our wipes are manufactured with the highest grade materials and undergo meticulous inspection to ensure our customers receive the very best. If you are not satisfied for any reason, contact us and we will refund your purchase so that we can make you a happy customer as you deserve! Click now and order with confidence!

product_details_tab_data.Title: Tea Tree Oil Eyelid & Lash Wipes | With Hyaluronic Acid, Green Tea & Chamomile For Blepharitis & Itchy Eyes, Box Of 60 Individually Wrapped Eyelash Wipes, Natural Makeup Remover & Daily Cleanser
product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Skin Care › Make-up Removers › Make-Up Cleansing Wipes
product_details_tab_data.Recommended Uses: Care and cleaning of eyelids and eyelashes, removing impurities, relieving discomfort such as conjunctivitis and allergies
product_details_tab_data.Product Benefit: Soothing eye irritations, removing makeup, and relieving symptoms of blepharitis and Demodex
product_details_tab_data.Ingredients: Aqua, polysorbate 20, PEG-7 glyceryl cocoate, melaleuca alternifolia (tea tree) leaf oil, aloe barbadensis leaf water, green tea extract chamomilla recutita (matricaria) flower extract, retinyl palmitate, hyaluronic acid, propylene glycol, disodium cocoamphodiacetate, sodium laureth sulfate, green tea
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. If irritation occurs, discontinue use. Keep out of reach of children.
